title: Caleb's Desireful Modpack
description: This is a Modpack which uses the optimization mods of Fabulously optimized , qol mods like Craftpresence, and the best of the best PVP mods
body:
# 🚀 [Caleb's Desireful Modpack]

A high-performance PvP experience built for competitive play, stability, and maximum frames. 

---

## ⚡ Features
* **Maximized Performance:** Built on a world-class optimization foundation to ensure smooth gameplay even in intense combat.
* **Low Latency:** Optimized network settings to reduce ghost hits and input lag.
* **PvP Essentials:** Includes [e.g.,BactroMod, Custom Crosshair mod, Eymistaken's Hud].
* **Clean Visuals:** Pre-configured for clarity, removing clutter so you can focus on the fight.

---

## 🛠️ Performance Foundation
This modpack utilizes the industry-standard optimization suite from **Fabulously Optimized**. By integrating these specific mods and configurations, we ensure that players on all hardware levels can compete fairly.

### Credits & Licensing
* **Optimization Base:** [Fabulously Optimized](https://modrinth.com/modpack/fabulously-optimized) by FlashyReese.
* **License:**FO Base mods Used under the **BSD 3-Clause License**.
    * *Note: This project is an independent derivative and is not officially endorsed by the Fabulously Optimized team.*

---

## 📝 Included Optimizations
We've included the core "engine" of FO, including:
* **Sodium / Iris:** For modern rendering and shader support.
* **Lithium:** For optimized game logic.
* **FerriteCore:** To keep memory usage lean.
* **Entity Culling:** To stop your GPU from rendering things you can't see.
and more ofc
---

## ❓ How to Install
1. Download the `.mrpack` file.
2. Import it into the **Modrinth Launcher** or **Prism Launcher**.
3. Allocate at least **2-4GB of RAM** for the best experience.
